context: Tests whether the agent implements a correct S3-triggered image processing Lambda that uses AWS Rekognition for moderation, sharp for resizing, and correctly handles verified-purchase auto-approval logic.

checklist.name: Rekognition moderation used
checklist.description: Calls AWS Rekognition detectModerationLabels (via @aws-sdk/client-rekognition) to screen the uploaded image

checklist.name: MinConfidence 75
checklist.description: Passes MinConfidence: 75 (not a different value) to detectModerationLabels

checklist.name: Reject on any flagged label
checklist.description: Rejects the upload (sets status to 'rejected') whenever ModerationLabels contains one or more entries

checklist.name: Rejection reason recorded
checklist.description: Stores the rejectionReason as the joined moderation label names (not just a boolean or generic message)

checklist.name: Sharp for resizing
checklist.description: Uses the sharp library (not jimp, canvas, or another image library) to resize the uploaded image

checklist.name: Three size variants
checklist.description: Produces exactly three size variants: thumbnail (200px wide), medium (600px wide), and full (1200px wide)

checklist.name: WebP output quality 80
checklist.description: Converts each resized variant to WebP format with quality 80 (not another format or different quality value)

checklist.name: Approved S3 key path
checklist.description: Stores resized variants under the path ugc/approved/{productId}/{ugcId}/{suffix}.webp

checklist.name: Verified purchase auto-approve
checklist.description: Sets status to 'approved' automatically for verified purchasers (customers who ordered the same product)

checklist.name: Pending review for non-verified
checklist.description: Sets status to 'pending_review' (not 'approved' or 'rejected') for uploads from customers without a verified purchase

checklist.name: S3 ObjectCreated trigger
checklist.description: The processing function is triggered by (or explicitly handles) an S3 ObjectCreated event, not a direct API call or polling loop

checklist.name: EXIF data stripped
checklist.description: Strips or omits EXIF metadata from the output image (e.g. uses sharp's default strip behaviour or explicitly calls .withMetadata(false))
